what_it_does: Implements a self-contained IIFE that attaches a library of pure, deterministic SVG and HTML generator functions to window.DNA.org, producing token-coloured visual organisms (icons, diagrams, charts, graphs, connectors, synthetic artefacts, board groups, star-field constellations, and a nav rail) driven by CSS custom properties and optional data.
observations: Every public function returns an SVG or HTML string rather than a DOM node.
A 24x24 drafted icon set is embedded as path strings and exposed via DNA.org.icon and DNA.org._icons.
Rendering uses a seeded mulberry32 PRNG so mesh, hub, and constellation outputs are deterministic.
Colours are exclusively CSS custom properties such as --gold, --bronze-line, --page, etc.
The graph function projects a containment tree with folder-orbit dots, type-coloured file dots, and a depth/sibling layout.

A synthetic artefact family (designLibraryObject, fileStack, planThumbnail, projectTileGrid, versionStack, sourcePanelVisual, evidenceBand, interfaceFragment, artifactFlow, artifactCluster) provides material-density stand-ins.
boardGroups and constellation are shaped for faceRecord data (boardRecord and transcriptRecord).
navRail emits accessible button tiles referencing global DNA.iconSVG.
Several small helper functions (esc, statusCol, etc.) are redefined in multiple places.
standouts: The graph organism with folder-orbit dot rings, type-coloured composition dots, and deterministic containment projection.
The synthetic material-density artefact family that mimics real design assets, plans, files, and UI fragments without external images.
The seeded PRNG used across multiple organisms for reproducible weather/network/constellation layouts.
The connector SVG that combines socket, dashed transport line, and octagonal authorize plug as a single token-coloured motif.
conventions: Pure functions taking (data, options) and returning markup strings.
CSS custom property tokens for all colour values.
Optional options object with defaults via o = o || {}.
Inline SVG with viewBox and overflow:visible for diagrammatic organisms.
aria-label attributes on generated SVGs for accessibility.
camelCase function names and kebab-case CSS variables.
concerns: esc helper is redefined at least four times inside different functions instead of being shared.
Heavy inline style and SVG attribute strings reduce readability and make global style changes harder.
graph is a large monolithic function mixing geometry, layout, rendering, and side-output via o.out.
Some functions assume injected globals (DNA.iconSVG, DNA.ordinal) with only fallback stubs.
Input strings are escaped inconsistently; some labels use replace without escaping ampersands/quotes.
No visible input validation or size clamping for options like n, cols, rows.
notes: A token-driven, deterministic SVG factory for the surface layer: every visual is generated as a string and coloured by CSS variables, with a growing family of synthetic stand-ins for real assets.
questions: Where are DNA.iconSVG and DNA.ordinal expected to be injected, and what contract do they follow?
What is the exact schema of the tree data consumed by graph, especially childrenOf and node type/icon fields?
What do faceRecord.boardRecord and faceRecord.transcriptRecord look like for boardGroups and constellation?
How are the CSS custom properties (--gold, --bronze-line, --warmpole-*, etc.) defined and themed?
Is this file intended to run in a browser only, or also in a server-side rendering context?
What does the comment 'canon: faces.organisms' refer to?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose matches the implementation: it is a live generator library for the organism layer and icon set, returning token-coloured SVG/HTML strings.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to build a reusable, content-agnostic visual grammar for a design/code substrate surface, where every graphic is generated from data and design tokens rather than raster or vector assets, enabling consistent theming and deterministic rendering across views.
novelty: The folder-orbit dot rings with type-coloured composition and a radial divider in the graph; the synthetic artefact family that renders plausible plans, UI fragments, image placeholders, and document stacks from pure SVG; the taxonomy emergence diagram showing provisional ghost kinds giving way to real kinds.
contribution: A deterministic, token-coloured SVG/HTML organism library that generates icons, diagrams, charts, graphs, connectors, and synthetic material-density visuals without external assets, serving as a reusable visual substrate for surface views.
summary_for_embedding: A browser IIFE that exposes window.DNA.org, a collection of pure functions returning CSS-token-coloured SVG and HTML organisms including icons, diagrams, charts, graphs, synthetic artefacts, board groups, constellations, and a nav rail.
intention_for_embedding: To provide a deterministic, themeable, asset-free visual generator library for the surface organism layer.

symbols.does: Renders a single drafted icon as an SVG string.
symbols.description: Looks up the named path in the embedded P map and wraps it in a 24x24 viewBox SVG with configurable size and stroke colour, defaulting to var(--bronze-line).

symbols.does: Renders a row of icons on a dashed rail.
symbols.description: Places each named icon horizontally, draws a dashed bronze rail beneath them with drop lines, and optionally adds a descend line ending in a gold square.

symbols.does: Returns a seeded deterministic PRNG.
symbols.description: Implements the mulberry32 algorithm; given a seed it returns a function that yields pseudo-random numbers in [0,1), enabling reproducible mesh, hub, and constellation layouts.

symbols.does: Renders an ambient network mesh.
symbols.description: Generates n seeded nodes inside a W×H box, links each node to its two nearest forward neighbours, and colours nodes gold/ochre/bronze by distance from a heart point.

symbols.does: Maps a point to a colour by distance from the heart.
symbols.description: Local helper inside mesh that returns var(--gold), var(--ochre), or var(--bronze) based on normalized distance from the mesh heart.

symbols.does: Renders a radial hub-and-spoke network.
symbols.description: Draws a central polygon hub with labelled satellite nodes arranged in a circle; supports weighted scores as proximity/opacity/stroke, organic jitter, and directional arrows.

symbols.does: Renders a compact stats panel as HTML.
symbols.description: Builds a bordered, rounded container with a small-caps title and rows of figure/label pairs, optionally starring the first figure in gold.

symbols.does: Renders a vertical time-spine stage diagram.
symbols.description: Draws a dashed spine with stage boxes alternating left/right, connected by dashed elbows and labels, using token colours.

symbols.does: Renders a tiny-entry texture run as HTML.
symbols.description: Joins an array of strings with middots and formats them in a small monospace faint colour line.

symbols.does: Renders a chevron phase strip with one active segment.
symbols.description: Builds a horizontal sequence of chevron polygons; the active index is filled with goldwash and stroked in gold, while inactive segments are outlined in line colour.

symbols.does: Renders one chevron segment of a phase strip.
symbols.description: Local helper inside phaseStrip that computes the notch-cut polygon for a single segment and places centred text.

symbols.does: Renders a quote block with attribution.
symbols.description: Wraps a quote in large gold quotation marks and an italic body span, followed by a right-aligned bold attribution, optionally framed by a gold border.

symbols.does: Renders a comparison matrix of checks and crosses.
symbols.description: Builds an HTML table with columns and rows; cells contain a gold check or muted-red cross, with an optional highlighted self column bordered in gold.

symbols.does: Returns highlight style for a matrix column.
symbols.description: Local helper inside checkMatrix that emits a goldwash background when the column index matches the highlighted self column.

symbols.does: Renders a donut chart as SVG.
symbols.description: Draws segmented rings from values with optional ordinal colours and an optional centred text label.

symbols.does: Renders a simple bar chart as SVG.
symbols.description: Draws vertical bars scaled to the maximum value, optionally coloured via the ordinal ramp.

symbols.does: Resolves an ordinal colour from a ramp.
symbols.description: Tries DNA.ordinal(i,n) and falls back to a hard-coded gold-to-bronze token list, sampling the axis ramp by index.

symbols.does: Renders a clustered radial repo graph as SVG.
symbols.description: Projects a containment tree into columns along the screen's long/short axes, draws folder nodes with type-coloured orbit dots, file nodes by type hue, containment connectors, and exposes geometry via o.out.

symbols.does: Looks up children of a tree address.
symbols.description: Local helper inside graph that returns tree.childrenOf[addr] or an empty array.

symbols.does: Escapes HTML special characters.
symbols.description: Local helper inside graph that replaces &, <, >, and " with entities.

symbols.does: Middle-truncates a label while preserving extension.
symbols.description: Local helper inside graph that shortens long file names to 18 characters, keeping any extension after the ellipsis.

symbols.does: Computes a column's depth-axis position.
symbols.description: Local helper inside graph that returns mx + ci*DEP + R for the depth coordinate of column ci.

symbols.does: Renders type-coloured orbit dots around a folder.
symbols.description: Local helper inside graph that places sorted child-type dots in concentric clockwise rings around a folder and draws a radial divider between directory and file dots.

symbols.does: Renders a single graph node group.
symbols.description: Local helper inside graph that emits a transform group containing a disc, optional icon, optional orbit, and label, with data attributes for interaction.

symbols.does: Renders a bowed graph edge with arrowhead.
symbols.description: Local helper inside graph that draws a quadratic curve between two points, tinted by source type or gold on focus, and adds a directional arrowhead.

symbols.does: Filters and sorts children for a graph column.
symbols.description: Local helper inside graph that applies query filtering, sorts directories before files, and returns the column's items.

symbols.does: Computes a sibling's position along the sibling axis.
symbols.description: Local helper inside graph that centres child levels under their active parent or lays the root level from the margin.

symbols.does: Renders a socket-to-plug connector SVG.
symbols.description: Draws a bronze socket ring, dashed transport line, gold prongs, and an octagonal authorize plug with a bolt glyph and radial glow, all token-coloured.

symbols.does: Renders a provisional-to-real taxonomy diagram.
symbols.description: Shows dashed ghost pills on the left, filled emerged pills on the right, and dashed transition arrows from prior guesses to real kinds.

symbols.does: Escapes HTML special characters.
symbols.description: Local helper inside taxonomyEmergence that replaces &, <, >, and " with entities for labels.

symbols.does: Computes a pill's vertical centre.
symbols.description: Local helper inside taxonomyEmergence that returns padY + step*(i+0.5) for row placement.

symbols.does: Renders a grid of abstract design tiles.
symbols.description: Generates a cols×rows grid of small material-density tiles with warm cover bands and caption lines, highlighting one tile in goldwash.

symbols.does: Renders a single design tile's cover hint.
symbols.description: Local helper inside designLibraryObject that draws varied warm cover shapes and two faint caption lines for a non-highlighted tile.

symbols.does: Renders a stack of document pages.
symbols.description: Draws n offset page rectangles with a warm header band, content lines, and a single gold dog-ear on the front page.

symbols.does: Renders a blueprint plan thumbnail.
symbols.description: Draws a framed architectural plan with a faint grid, poché walls, partition door gap, dimension line, title block, and a single gold focal marker.

symbols.does: Renders a filled plan wall rectangle.
symbols.description: Local helper inside planThumbnail that emits a rect filled with the bronze-line ink for poché walls.

symbols.does: Renders a grid of project cards.
symbols.description: Generates a cols×rows grid of project cover cards with warm cover regions, label bars, and one gold-highlighted card.

symbols.does: Renders a version history stack.
symbols.description: Draws a vertical lineage spine with version rows; the current row is marked with a gold node, goldwash background, and a warm thumbnail chip.

symbols.does: Renders a framed source image panel or synthetic placeholder.
symbols.description: Either clips a real image asset or generates a rich golden-hour architecture placeholder with gradients, sun glow, house silhouette, and reflection; a gold dot marks real assets.

symbols.does: Renders a horizontal evidence/stat chip band.
symbols.description: Draws figure/label pairs separated by faint dividers, using muted gold for figures and secondary colour for uppercase labels.

symbols.does: Renders a mini app UI chrome.
symbols.description: Draws a window title bar, sidebar rail with selected item, content cards, and a single gold primary button as a product-UI stand-in.

symbols.does: Renders an input-process-output flow.
symbols.description: Draws a left-to-right chain of nodes with arrows; the last node is highlighted in goldwash with a gold checkmark.

symbols.does: Composes artefact stand-ins into a scattered desk hero.
symbols.description: Layers sourcePanelVisual, planThumbnail, fileStack, designLibraryObject, interfaceFragment, and projectTileGrid with absolute positioning, rotation, and token shadows in dense or sparse layouts.

symbols.does: Wraps an artefact in absolute-positioned HTML.
symbols.description: Local helper inside artifactCluster that returns a div with percentage-based position, rotation, box-shadow, and z-index.

symbols.does: Renders grouped board sections as HTML.
symbols.description: Builds a responsive grid of cards, each with a nested header showing group name and gold count, followed by item rows with label, channel, and state badge.

symbols.does: Escapes HTML special characters.
symbols.description: Local helper inside boardGroups that replaces &, <, >, and " with entities for labels, channels, and states.

symbols.does: Maps a state string to a token colour.
symbols.description: Local helper inside boardGroups that returns var(--gold) for living/active/live/open/pending states and var(--secondary) otherwise.

symbols.does: Renders a star-field transcript visualization.
symbols.description: In grounded mode draws theme stars with claim satellites; otherwise lays session nodes in a phyllotaxis galaxy with brightness controlling glow and size, and labels only the brightest few.

symbols.does: Escapes HTML special characters.
symbols.description: Local helper inside constellation that replaces &, <, >, and " with entities for labels.

symbols.does: Truncates a label with ellipsis.
symbols.description: Local helper inside constellation that shortens strings longer than n characters, appending an ellipsis.

symbols.does: Maps a node status to a token colour.
symbols.description: Local helper inside constellation that returns var(--gold-pop) for supervised-live/live/active, var(--bronze) for closed, and var(--ochre) otherwise.

symbols.does: Renders a single star node with optional label.
symbols.description: Local helper inside constellation that draws a glow circle, inner circle, and optional text label at a given position.

symbols.does: Renders a rail of navigable face tiles.
symbols.description: Builds a horizontal or vertical nav of button tiles containing an optional icon and a human label, marking the active tile with an active class and aria-current.

symbols.does: Escapes HTML special characters.
symbols.description: Local helper inside navRail that replaces &, <, >, and " with entities for labels and navigation ids.
